sources.text: Glass Choir posted another low-pay registry shift in the relay row. The work is ordinary, the memory of who showed up is not.

rules.label: You took the registry shift. The immediate return was small, but Glass Choir logged your name.
You ignored the routine work.

sources.text: spore bloom struck the Civic Ward cobalt north quay sector. Civic Ward has posted two response lanes with different standing requirements. Check your current state before committing.

public_requirements.label: Civic Ward standing 2+ unlocks civic cordon (expected yield ~59); successful use spends 5 standing.
Debt 48 or lower preserves trusted response access.
Aura 2+ unlocks safe exploitation (expected yield ~70); successful use spends 9 aura.
Debt 30 or lower keeps the exploit lane viable.

rules.label: Civic Ward trusted you to run the civic cordon protocol and contain the spill cleanly.
You reached for faction cover without enough standing to clear the lane.
You exploited the disruption for value, burning readiness to do it.
You lunged for upside without enough visible margin to survive the blast.
The interrupt rolled through while you hesitated.

Aura 3+ unlocks safe exploitation (expected yield ~106); successful use spends 12 aura.
Debt 28 or lower keeps the exploit lane viable.

rules.label: Glass Choir trusted you to run the glass curtain protocol and contain the spill cleanly.
You reached for faction cover without enough standing to clear the lane.
You exploited the disruption for value, burning readiness to do it.
You lunged for upside without enough visible margin to survive the blast.
The interrupt rolled through while you hesitated.

sources.text: Glass Choir posted another low-pay cleanup shift in the archive annex. The work is ordinary, the memory of who showed up is not.

rules.label: You took the cleanup shift. The immediate return was small, but Glass Choir logged your name.
You ignored the routine work.

sources.text: Another stocktake rota opened under Civic Ward supervision. The wage is forgettable, the optionality is not.

rules.label: You took the stocktake shift. The immediate return was small, but Civic Ward logged your name.
You ignored the routine work.
